channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping not resolved, 24th April
item.description:
This was already reported but shown as fixed but it isn’t fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist Graffiti by the garage door company, 24th April
item.description:
There’s racist graffiti on the wall by the black garage doors which needs removing please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple broken abandoned bike frames opposite station entrance, 24th April
item.description:
There are maybe 6 or 7 abandoned bike frames locked to the bike racks on the street. Just off castle square, opposite the entrance to elephant and castle train station, at the bottom of the steps leading up to the restaurants and nursery. They’ve been here for months if not a year or so, I go to the gym nearby so I’ve noticed. They are using up at least four bike racks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elephant Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken planter beds, 24th April
item.description:
The wooden planter beds are totally broken and in a terrible condition.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowley Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple broken slabs & trip hazards, 24th April
item.description:
The pavement outside Tunnel Wharf especially on the east (no 123) is very badly damaged. This has been caused by repeated trucks mounting the kerb. It presents a major trip hazard. I have mobility problems as do some of my fellow residents and wheelchair access is impeded. Repairing the pavement per se will not be a solution unless bollards are installed to prevent trucks parking or mounting the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121-123, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fix my street previous reference:7422946. 12 months ago I reported the drains in the alleyway abutting my property were blocked causing flooding to my garden. I was informed that the drains had been checked and they were functioning. To solve the problem of my garden always being water logged I planned to get a french drain installed, however investigation has shown that one of the drains in the alleyway is constantly leaking into my garden which is the source of the water causing the issues in my garden. The drain needs repairing., 24th April
item.description:
One of the drains in the alleyway is leaking water into my garden causing my garden to be waterlogged. The issue has been present ever since moving here 5 years ago. I tried to get it resolved last year without success.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside dexters, 24th April
item.description:
Big pile of rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish dumped in the street, 24th April
item.description:
Mattresses dumped, guttering strutted into a bin so much cardboard left by bins that refuse collection wont take because the bins are ‘contaminated’ please make our street tidy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stickers on postbox, 24th April
item.description:
Lots of stickers on postbox near Kennington tube

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly broken park seat, 24th April
item.description:
There are 4 seats on the paved area outside the tennis/bowling club. The seat furthest to the west (outside the bowling club) is badly damaged and potentially dangerous as the back support has become detached from the seat.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tootswood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on pedestrian pathway fully, 24th April
item.description:
The person left their damaged car parked on the pedestrian path way at one point had 3 penalties and some notes left by some people and they went out and take them off their windshield and carried on leaving it there making it a dangerous way to people to cross as they have to either walk on grass which rains sometimes and if muddy could slip or walk into the road which cars can come quite fast sometimes and might cause hazard especially as it's on the corner of the road
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 24th April
item.description:
1 large fridge 1 small fridge 2 beer plastic cylinders
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping again, attracting foxes now, 24th April
item.description:
More stuff dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Overgrown hedge blocking the pavement, 24th April
item.description:
Overgrown hedge from 111 Clive Rd is blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tritton Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bins, 24th April
item.description:
Hello my neighbours bins are overflowing. They have not been collected
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Pavement unswept, 24th April
item.description:
Contractor defaulting on scheduled sweeping yet again. 2nd complaint this year. Why aren't they fined for non performance?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Spinneys, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Hazardous Gas Canisters, 24th April
item.description:
These gas canisters contain hazardous gas. This is now becoming a regular occurrence in Brixham Road and surrounding streets.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixham Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders Rubbish, 24th April
item.description:
A neighbour doing construction filled all of our garbage and recycling bins with builders rubble/rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White goods dropped at the corner, 24th April
item.description:
Someone dropped these items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Naylor Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Box of canisters dumped, 24th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a box of canisters and they are in the sun

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Close, North End, Greater London
